name: Barracks
notes: Shared building type between Capital, Treehouse, Firebase, Windy Peaks, Rivergate, Signal Ridge, and Camp Cozy — same definition, base eligibility is authored on each BaseDef's buildableBuildings list, not here. Unlocks, in order: Rifleman, Grenadier, Flamethrower, Shielder, Sniper. Engineer is a Factory unlock, not Barracks — see data/buildings/factory.json.
